name: Grades.Bouldering

values.name: compare
values.comment: Compare two grades and return an ordering relation

values.name: next
values.comment:
Next discrete grade in the current grading system.

This ignores modifiers and some intermediate levels.

values.name: parseAs
values.comment: Parse grade string using Hueco V-grade system

values.name: prev
values.comment:
Previous discrete grade in the current grading system.

This ignores modifiers and some intermediate levels.

values.name: showAs
values.comment: Render grade using some grading system

values.name: simplify
values.comment: Remove modifiers (soft, hard, etc) from grade

values.name: to
values.comment: Convert grade to the given system

values.name: toLinearScale
values.comment: Convert grade to numeric value for easy comparison

name: Grades.Generic

aliases.name: Generic
aliases.comment:
Recording storing functions that implement the
API for handling climbing and bouldering grades
aliases.type: { show : grade -> String.String, showAs : sys -> grade -> String.String, parse : String.String -> Maybe.Maybe grade, parseAs : sys -> String.String -> Maybe.Maybe grade, simplify : grade -> grade, withMod : Grades.Levels.Mod.Mod -> grade -> grade, next : grade -> grade, prev : grade -> grade, to : sys -> grade -> grade, zero : grade, compare : grade -> grade -> Basics.Order, toLinearScale : grade -> Basics.Float, fromLinearScale : sys -> Basics.Float -> grade }
